2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

11 Cash Herndon

  • Position Guard
  • Height 6-1
  • Class Redshirt Sophomore
  • Hometown Mayo, Md.
  • Highschool South River
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2024-25 (R-Fr.)
Appeared in four games for a total of 13 minutes.

Prior to Frostburg: Lettered 4x in basketball and 1x in lacrosse at South River... 2x First Team All-County... Named Third Team All-State... Second All-Time leading scorer in high school... Received the Presidential Award... Named to the National Honor Society.

Personal: Son of Michael and Denise Herndon... Majoring in Law and Humanities.

Statistics

Season:
2025-26
  • 2023-24
  • 2024-25
  • 2025-26
